decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id 'project_116th-st-bus-pedestrian-priority' already matches the canonical registry record. Both describe the same project: bus and pedestrian priority improvements on 116th Street in Manhattan (offset bus lanes, pedestrian islands, bus queue jump signals, left turn lanes, parking-protected bike lanes). The registry card's source_ids already include the observation's source (116_st_morningside_ave_pleasant_ave_cb11_may2025). The CB11 May 2025 presentation is simply a different venue/timing for the same proposed project as the CB10 June 2025 presentation cited in the registry. Other similar registry records (project_116th-st-morningside-to-pleasant-bus-priority-review, project_116th-street-study-manhattan) are studies/reviews rather than the project itself.
